name: Hobby
summary: Free forever for personal projects and web app prototypes.

name: Pro
summary: Professional developers, freelancers, and businesses that need team collaboration and higher limits.

name: Enterprise
summary: Security, performance, support, and compliance for larger teams.

name: Free
summary: Build and deploy free forever with hard monthly limits.

name: Personal
summary: Ready for real traffic with higher included credits and priority email support.

name: Pro
summary: Team plan with shared environment variables, private organization repos, and higher credits.

name: Enterprise
summary: SLA, enterprise network tier, SSO, SCIM, and dedicated support.

name: Free
summary: Small apps on Railway with a 30-day free trial and then a low monthly floor.

name: Hobby
summary: Side projects with $5 of monthly usage credits and global regions.

name: Pro
summary: Professional developers and teams shipping production applications.

name: Enterprise
summary: Compliance, SSO, audit retention, and dedicated support at larger scale.

name: Free
summary: Transactional email for prototypes with 3,000 emails per month and a 100 emails/day daily limit.

name: Pro
summary: Paid plan for live apps with 50,000 emails per month and no daily limit.

name: Scale
summary: Higher-volume sending with 100,000 emails per month and Slack support.

name: Enterprise
summary: Priority support and flexible limits for custom sending requirements.

name: Hobby
summary: Free plan for building with up to 50,000 retained users per app.

name: Pro
summary: Full-featured authentication for production with MFA, satellite domains, and remove-branding.

name: Business
summary: Compliance and support tier for growing teams with audit and priority support features.

name: Enterprise
summary: Custom support, uptime SLA, workspace SSO, and HIPAA availability.

name: Free
summary: Developer plan for testing integrations with 100 emails per month.

name: Basic
summary: Solo developers and smaller teams sending around 10,000 emails per month.

name: Pro
summary: Start-ups and small businesses with customizable data retention.

name: Platform
summary: Higher-volume sending with unlimited users and platform-grade controls.

name: Free
summary: Good for demos, side projects, and early prototypes with a real hosted backend.

name: Pro
summary: Production starting point with daily backups, PITR, and higher quotas.

name: Team
summary: Team collaboration tier with role-based access, environments, and SSO features.

name: Enterprise
summary: Custom support, security review, and larger deployment requirements.

name: Free
summary: Free forever for development, previews, and intermittent workloads.

name: Launch
summary: Usage-based production tier for real apps with higher limits and no monthly minimum.

name: Scale
summary: Higher-load production tier with private networking, longer restore windows, and compliance features.

name: Hobby
summary: Personal projects and small apps with one project, two environments, and pay-as-you-go compute.

name: Professional
summary: Production apps for small teams with private networking, preview environments, and 500 GB bandwidth.

name: Organization
summary: Higher-traffic and compliance-focused teams with audit logs and 1 TB included bandwidth.

name: Enterprise
summary: Security, SAML SSO, uptime guarantees, and premium support.

name: Free Tier
summary: Static sites on App Platform for portfolios, simple sites, and early experiments.

name: Shared 1 GB
summary: Good first paid app container with autoscaling disabled but enough headroom for small production apps.

name: Dedicated 512 MB
summary: Dedicated CPU starting point for autoscaling production services.

name: Workers Free
summary: Good for prototypes and low-volume edge apps with daily included usage.

name: Workers Paid
summary: Standard Workers usage model with a $5 monthly minimum and larger included request limits.

name: Enterprise
summary: Contract pricing and custom limits for teams with enterprise Cloudflare arrangements.

name: Pay-as-you-go Infrastructure
summary: Usage-based Fly.io compute and networking with the smallest shared-cpu machine starting around $2.02/mo if it runs continuously.
price_label: Usage-based; smallest shared CPU starts about $2.02/mo

name: Standard Support
summary: Dedicated engineering support for teams running production workloads on Fly.io.

name: Compliance Made Easy
summary: Adds HIPAA-ready compliance coverage and paperwork for regulated Fly.io workloads.

name: Enterprise Support
summary: Custom SLA and emergency support for larger Fly.io deployments.

name: Hobby
summary: Free durable execution tier with 50,000 executions per month and basic alerting.

name: Pro
summary: Production-ready Inngest plan with 1M included executions and higher concurrency.

name: Enterprise
summary: Custom executions, SAML, RBAC, and dedicated support for large teams.

name: Free
summary: Free Trigger.dev cloud tier with $5 monthly usage included and 20 concurrent runs.

name: Hobby
summary: Low-cost paid Trigger.dev plan with $10 of included monthly usage and better limits.

name: Pro
summary: Higher-concurrency Trigger.dev plan for teams with larger task volume and dedicated Slack support.

name: Starter
summary: Cloud starter plan with 2.5K workflow executions and unlimited users.

name: Pro
summary: Cloud production plan for solo builders and small teams with more projects and execution capacity.

name: Business
summary: Self-hosted collaboration plan for companies needing SSO, environments, and scaling options.

name: Enterprise
summary: Hosted or self-hosted enterprise deployment with custom executions, dedicated support, and invoice billing.

name: Free
summary: Free Mailgun plan for testing with 100 emails per day and core API delivery features.

name: Basic
summary: Low-cost Mailgun send plan with 10,000 emails per month and no daily limit.

name: Foundation
summary: Higher-volume Mailgun plan with 50,000 monthly emails and expanded domain and template support.

name: Scale
summary: Production Mailgun plan with 100,000 emails per month, SAML SSO, and dedicated IP pools.

name: Enterprise
summary: Custom Mailgun contract with deliverability services, burst sending, and tailored support.

name: Free Trial
summary: Try SendGrid Email API free for 60 days with core delivery and analytics features.

name: Basic
summary: Starter paid SendGrid Email API tier for smaller production workloads.

name: Advanced
summary: Higher SendGrid tier with stronger analytics, deliverability, and account-management limits.

name: Custom
summary: High-volume SendGrid contract pricing with custom terms and expanded support.

name: Starter
summary: Pay-as-you-go Koyeb plan with no baseline cost and one free instance for getting started.

name: Pro
summary: Production Koyeb plan with $10 included compute, team access, and support features.

name: Scale
summary: Team scaling plan with higher included usage and priority Slack support.

name: Enterprise
summary: Custom Koyeb deployment plan with committed spend and 24x7 support.

name: Free
summary: Generous free PostHog tier with monthly included usage across core products like analytics and feature flags.

name: Usage-based
summary: Self-serve PostHog pricing that stays pay-per-use after free monthly allocations run out.

name: AuthKit Free
summary: WorkOS AuthKit is free for up to 1 million monthly active users in production.

name: SSO Pay-as-you-go
summary: Enterprise SSO and Directory Sync connections billed per production connection.

summary: Prepaid WorkOS growth plan with discounts, uptime SLA, and guided migration support.

name: Free

summary: Growing startup plan with 50,000 monthly emails and more domains, templates, and API capacity.

name: Professional
summary: Higher-throughput MailerSend plan for agencies and white-label senders at scale.

name: Free
summary: Free Pipedream tier for personal projects and low-volume automations.

name: Basic
summary: Starter paid Pipedream plan for developers shipping real workflow automations.

name: Advanced

name: Community

name: Team
summary: Hosted Windmill team plan for production workflow automation and collaboration.

name: Free

summary: Paid Descope plan for production auth with higher MAU limits and enterprise SSO support.

name: Enterprise

name: Free

name: Pro
